name: Buoy
description: Harbor buoys riding a gray-green swell — striped floats tip with the chop, re-anchored on every redraw.

code.style: --stripe: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color1)); --rule: ( border-bottom: calc(140px / @Y) solid var(--color4); box-sizing: border-box; /* both halves of the float share one emitted bob and tilt */ --bob: @r(28, 42); --bt2: @r(-12deg, 12deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; width: 40%; top: calc(@var(--bob) * 1%); height: 20%; border-radius: 99px 99px 0 0; background: var(--stripe); transform: rotate(@var(--bt2)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; width: 40%; top: calc(@var(--bob) * 1% + 20%); height: 18%; border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%; background: var(--color3); transform: rotate(@var(--bt2)); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
